svg.title: Which Kotlin class type to use
svg.desc: A decision flowchart for choosing between class, data class, sealed class, and object in Kotlin

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I decide which Kotlin class type to use?')
sendPrompt('When should I use a data class in Kotlin Android?')
sendPrompt('When should I use a sealed class in Kotlin Android?')
sendPrompt('When should I use object or companion object in Kotlin?')
sendPrompt('Show me a data class example for Android with copy, equals, and toString')
sendPrompt('Show me a sealed class example for handling API states in Android')
sendPrompt('Show me object and companion object examples in Kotlin Android')
sendPrompt('When should I use a regular class in Kotlin instead of data class or sealed class?')

svg.text: Tap any box to see a code example
